headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on McCormick & Co, Lowers Price Target to $67
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Thomas Palmer   maintains McCormick & Co (NYSE:MKC) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $78 to $67.
